fieldRules.readyWhen: Reviewer has decided the original education rewrite angle and confirmed it remains structural_draft.
fieldRules.blocker: No real human rewrite-angle decision exists yet.

fieldRules.readyWhen: Reviewer has confirmed each source family as direct evidence, boundary-only context, or unsuitable.
fieldRules.blocker: Source roles are still prompts and require human confirmation.

fieldRules.readyWhen: Reviewer has checked claims against source metadata and marked unresolved claims to remove.
fieldRules.blocker: No real fact-check pass exists yet.

fieldRules.readyWhen: Reviewer has checked no advice, signal, performance, broker/order, automation, production, or real-money wording.
fieldRules.blocker: No real safety-boundary pass exists yet.

fieldRules.readyWhen: Reviewer has checked notes and rewrite prose for no copied external source body text.
fieldRules.blocker: No real copying-risk pass exists yet.

fieldRules.readyWhen: Reviewer has actually completed the required review work for the lesson.
fieldRules.blocker: Human initials must remain blank until real review work is complete.

stopConditions: Stop if any required note field is prefilled before real human review.
Stop if docs/LESSON_BATCH_REVIEW_STATUS.json appears without explicit human note-taking.
Stop if any field asks for approval, release, commercial_ready, production readiness, or grade promotion.
Stop if any note suggests buy/sell/hold advice, trading signals, broker/order workflow, automation, performance claims, or real-money guidance.
Stop if any note copies external source body text.
Stop if yellow, red, or research_only sources are proposed as learner-facing evidence.
boundary: This matrix is reviewer-facing note readiness scaffolding only. It does not create docs/LESSON_BATCH_REVIEW_STATUS.json, fill human notes, approve lessons, publish learner-facing content, change lesson grades, certify commercial readiness, provide trading advice, imply performance, connect brokers, automate trading, or guide real-money decisions.
